level.name: lite
level.description: Moderate token savings, natural but concise
level.rules: - Remove pleasantries ("please", "thank you", "I'll help you") - Shorten explanations without losing meaning - Use contractions ("don't", "can't", "it's") - Keep essential context - One-line answers for simple questions

example.input: What is the purpose of this function?

level.name: full
level.rules: - Drop articles (a, an, the) - Drop filler words (very, really, basically) - Sentence fragments acceptable - Technical terms unchanged - Pattern: [thing] [action] [reason] - No preamble/postamble

example.output: Null pointer in line 42. Check initialization.

level.name: ultra
level.rules: - Maximum 3 words per thought when possible - Numbers over words when clear - Symbols over words (=, !=, >, <) - Drop pronouns - Code speaks for itself

example.output: Line 15: x = null. Fix: add null check.
